Macro Regime BEARISH 11/20

Cross-asset regime filter: ARKK/QQQ (growth risk appetite) · IWM/SPY (small-cap participation) · XLY/XLP (consumer risk on/off) · HYG/IEF (credit leading indicator). Each ratio scored 0–5 via SMA10/20/50 alignment + linear regression slope & R². Total 0–20: ≥15 Risk On · ≥10 Cautious · ≥5 Neutral · <5 Risk Off. Dashed line = SMA10 (blue) · SMA20 (yellow) · SMA30 (white) · SMA50 (purple).

Ratio Spread — Combined (Indexed)

Equal-weight composite of the 60-day rolling z-score of each ticker’s ATR-normalised distance from SMA20 — ARKK · IWM · HYG · XLY. Signal per ticker: (Close − SMA20) ÷ ATR14. Normalising by ATR14 equalises contribution across assets with very different volatility (e.g. ARKK vs HYG). Scale: ATR units. +1 = 1 ATR above SMA20 (aggregate). Above 0 = tickers in aggregate above SMA20 ■ · below 0 = below SMA20 ■. Dashed line: SMA10 of closes (yellow) — crossover with composite = momentum signal. Zero = SMA20 equilibrium.
